Catholic priesthood has three ranks deacon, priest, and bishop and each one has their own episcopal lineages.

These ranks may go in [[ola]] order, or they may be all manifestations of the [[Lambda Priesthood]].

All Catholic lineages lead to either [[Guillaume d'Estouteville]] (c. 1412–1483) or [[Scipione Rebiba]] (3 February 1504 – 23 July 1577)

{{Priestly Lineages}}

[[Category:Priesthood]]
[[sn:Catholic priesthood]][[Category:Lineages]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
